Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-powershell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-powershell
Language: c%23
Microsoft Azure PowerShell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
Language: c%23
This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for .NET. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-net.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BluePointLilac/ContextMenuManager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BluePointLilac/ContextMenuManager
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BornToBeRoot/NETworkManager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BornToBeRoot/NETworkManager
Language: c%23
A powerful tool for managing networks and troubleshoot network problems!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cysharp/UniTask
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cysharp/UniTask
Language: c%23
Provides an efficient allocation free async/await integration for Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Flow-Launcher/Flow.Launcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Flow-Launcher/Flow.Launcher
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantConnect/Lean

URL: https://github.com/QuantConnect/Lean
Language: c%23
Lean Algorithmic Trading Engine by QuantConnect (Python, C#)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuestPDF/QuestPDF
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuestPDF/QuestPDF
Language: c%23
QuestPDF is a modern library for PDF document generation. Its fluent C# API lets you design complex layouts with clean, readable code. Create documents using a flexible, component-based approach.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: babalae/better-genshin-impact
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/babalae/better-genshin-impact
Language: c%23
📦BetterGI · 更好的原神 - 自动拾取 | 自动剧情 | 全自动钓鱼(AI) | 全自动七圣召唤 | 自动伐木 | 自动刷本 | 自动采集/挖矿/锄地 | 一条龙 | 全连音游 - UI Automation Testing Tools For Genshin Impact

Language: c%23

ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/garnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/garnet
Language: c%23
Garnet is a remote cache-store from Microsoft Research that offers strong performance (throughput and latency), scalability, storage, recovery, cluster sharding, key migration, and replication features. Garnet can work with existing Redis clients.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk
Language: c%23
The official C# SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients. Maintained in collaboration with Microsoft.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: c%23
